semantic.role: Prompt generation engine for architectural violation fix suggestions.
responsibilities: Construct a structured prompt string from a set of violations and file context, intended to be passed to an LLM to auto-generate a corrected file.
Format violations with rule IDs, severities, reasons, and optional rule content.
Include source file content and structural skeleton in the prompt.
Provide instructions for the LLM to produce a corrected file while preserving non-violation functionality.
outOfScope: Does not execute the fix or modify files directly.
Does not validate the LLM output.
Does not determine which violations to fix.
invariants: Must not import CLI, service, or presentation layer modules to maintain engine independence.
Output must be a plain string (no side effects).

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide a reusable, engine-level utility for generating fix prompts that can be consumed by any service or task without coupling to orchestration.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Part of a release gate fix and source sync pass. No architectural change to this module.

publicSurface.description: Generates a full prompt string for an LLM to fix architectural violations in a given file. Accepts a FixViolationContext with file path, content, structural skeleton, and violations array.
Interface defining the input structure for generateFixPrompt: file path, file content, structural skeleton, and an array of violation objects with ruleId, severity, reason, and optional ruleContent.
